prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为14609→15770→15879→17201→11824名。2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势（从14609后移至17201，累计后移约2592名），但2025年因内蒙古 高考改革（理科→物理类、本科一批→本科批）位次大幅前移至11824名，波动较大。2025年基准位次约11824名；该校在内蒙古自治区物理类招生计划2021–2023 年均为106人，2024年略降至101人，2025年恢复至106人；2026年计划仍为106人，与2025年持平，计划无扩缩变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工 大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第113名持续上升至2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和声誉增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年高考周期曾出现偏负面声誉（郑强管理争议），但后续无明显重大负面事件；2026年高考周期声誉数据中未出现该校，表明近期舆情平稳。抖音热度排名第63位 （评价'一般'），主要曝光内容为CUBA篮球赛事，整体关注度中等；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；虽A类学科数量较 少，但作为山西省唯一211理工类高校，在化工、机械、电气、计算机等工科领域有较强学科基础，相关专业对理科考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子 信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与该校工科优势方向匹配；内蒙古2026年普通高考考生总数约154000人（较2025年116360人增加约32%）， 按近年物理类占比约72%估算，2026年物理类考生约110880人，较2025年83716人增加约32%，竞争显著加剧。省控线数据2026年缺失，；太原理工大 学位于山西太原，与内蒙古自治区相邻，属邻省关系，对内蒙古考生有天然地域便利性和文化接近性，报考意愿相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11824名、2026 年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加约32%导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大）。预测 最低位次约12174名，区间11674–12674名。

- 电气工程及其自动化（明向校区）
- 通信工程（明向校区）
- 人工智能（明向校区）。

- 冶金工程（虎峪校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11674–12674名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次优于区间下限（<11674名），可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、电气工程及 其自动化等一档热门专业；若位次接近区间上限（约12674名），建议以三档中的化学工程与工艺（该校A-优势学科）作为稳妥选择，同时搭配二档专业。注意2026年本省物理类 考生大幅增加，竞争加剧，建议适当降低预期，合理设置梯度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 14609 → 15770 → 15879 → 17201 → 11824 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of gradual backward movement (from 14609 to 17201, a cumulative backward shift of about 2592 places), but in 2025, due to the Inner Mongolia college entrance examination reform (Science → Physics Category, First Batch Undergraduate → Undergraduate Batch), the ranking moved significantly forward to 11824, showing large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11824; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region was 106 students from 2021 to 2023, slightly decreased to 101 in 2024, and returned to 106 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 106, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation, increasing attractiveness to candidates; during the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a somewhat negative reputation (Zheng Qiang management controversy), but no significant negative events followed; in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university did not appear in reputation data, indicating recent public opinion is stable. Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd (rated 'average'), with main exposure content being CUBA basketball events, overall attention moderate; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; although the number of A-class disciplines is relatively small, as the only 211 science and engineering university in Shanxi Province, it has a strong disciplinary foundation in engineering fields such as chemical engineering, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and computer science, providing stable appeal to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, matching the university's engineering strengths; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 154,000 (an increase of about 32% from 116,360 in 2025), and based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 72%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 110,880, an increase of about 32% from 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi, adjacent to Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, a neighboring province relationship, providing natural geographical convenience and cultural proximity for Inner Mongolia candidates, with relatively stable application willingness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11824, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 32% in local Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward (ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12174, with a range of 11674–12674.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11674–12674, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<11674), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (approximately 12674), it is recommended to choose Chemical Engineering and Technology (the university's A- advantage discipline) from Tier 3 as a stable choice, while also including Tier 2 majors. Note that the number of local Physics Category candidates in 2026 has significantly increased, intensifying competition, so it is advisable to lower expectations appropriately and set a reasonable gradient.
